reviews.comment:
Un solo surtidor había cuando fui y la cola daba vuelta la esquina

(Translated by Google)
There was only one pump when I went and the line went around the corner.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5dE1EYmp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Una basura de atención haces la cola y vienen un montón de gente con bidones y de ponen adelante. Cuando llegue atendierion a dos que venían con bidones y cuando me tocaba salieron con lo de cambio de turno. Una hora para medir los tanques y todas las boludeces qué hacen para eso

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible. You wait in line and a bunch of people with jerrycans cut in front of you. When I arrived, they served two people with jerrycans, and when it was my turn, they came up with the excuse about changing shifts. An hour to measure the tanks and all the other nonsense they do for that.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5OE1QUTh3RRAB
